app.name: Ovumcy
meta.description.privacy: Ovumcy Privacy Policy - Zero data collection, self-hosted period tracker.
pwa.install.title: Install Ovumcy
pwa.install.prompt_text: Add it to your home screen for a faster full-screen experience.
pwa.install.ios_text: Open the Safari share menu, then tap Add to Home Screen.
pwa.install.menu_text: Open your browser menu and choose Add to Home Screen.

onboarding.step1.title: When did your last period start?
onboarding.step1.subtitle: Choose a date from the last 60 days.
onboarding.step1.day1_tip: Day 1 is the first day of full flow, not spotting.
onboarding.step1.privacy: All your data stays on this server only. We do not store personal identity details.
onboarding.step2.title: Set up cycle parameters
onboarding.step2.cycle_length_hint: Move the slider to the cycle length you usually see from one period start to the next. A common baseline is about 21-35 days.
onboarding.step2.period_length_hint: This is the number of days with actual period flow, not spotting before it starts.
onboarding.step2.cycle_warning: Cycle values above 45 days should be discussed with a doctor.
onboarding.step2.period_warning: Period duration above 8 days should be discussed with a doctor.
onboarding.step2.error_incompatible: Period duration is incompatible with cycle length. Menstruation cannot take up almost the whole cycle.
onboarding.step2.warning_approximate: With these values, ovulation cannot be calculated reliably. Prediction will be approximate.
onboarding.step2.info_period_long: A duration above 8 days may indicate cycle irregularities; please discuss with a doctor.
onboarding.step2.info_cycle_short: A cycle shorter than 24 days is less common; please discuss with a doctor.
onboarding.step2.info_adjusted: Period length was adjusted automatically so at least 10 days remain before the next cycle.
onboarding.step2.auto_period_fill_hint: When enabled, marking the first day auto-fills the next days based on your period length.
onboarding.step2.irregular_cycle_hint: Turn this on if your cycles vary by more than 7 days. Ranges will be used for next period and ovulation instead of a single date.
onboarding.step2.age_group_hint: Optional. Stored with your profile; predictions use only your own cycle history.
onboarding.step2.usage_goal_hint: Optional. This changes UI emphasis only, not the prediction algorithm.
onboarding.error.invalid_last_period_sta: Please select a valid last period start date.
onboarding.error.last_period_range: Choose a date within the last 60 days.
onboarding.error.cycle_length_range: Cycle length must be between 15 and 90 days.
onboarding.error.period_length_range: Period length must be between 1 and 14 days.
onboarding.error.generic: Failed to save onboarding data. Please try again.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage cycle parameters, account security and data.
settings.cycle.title: Cycle Parameters
settings.cycle.last_period_start_hint: Optional. Used as a fallback cycle anchor when your journal does not yet have a marked cycle start.
settings.cycle.cycle_warning: Cycle values above 45 days should be discussed with a doctor.
settings.cycle.period_warning: Period duration above 8 days should be discussed with a doctor.
settings.cycle.error_incompatible: Period duration is incompatible with cycle length. Menstruation cannot take up almost the whole cycle.
settings.cycle.warning_approximate: With these values, ovulation cannot be calculated reliably. Prediction will be approximate.
settings.cycle.info_period_long: A duration above 8 days may indicate cycle irregularities; please discuss with a doctor.
settings.cycle.info_cycle_short: A cycle shorter than 24 days is less common; please discuss with a doctor.
settings.cycle.info_adjusted: Period length was adjusted automatically so at least 10 days remain before the next cycle.
settings.cycle.auto_period_fill_hint: When enabled, marking the first day auto-fills the next days based on your period length.
settings.cycle.irregular_cycle_hint: Turn this on if your cycles vary by more than 7 days. Ranges will be used for next period and ovulation instead of a single date.
settings.cycle.irregular_cycle_explainer: Enable this if your cycles differ by more than 7 days. Ranges will be used for next period and ovulation instead of a single date.
settings.cycle.unpredictable_cycle: My cycle is unpredictable (PCOS, perimenopause, etc.)
settings.cycle.unpredictable_cycle_hint: Turns date prediction off completely and keeps the dashboard focused on recorded facts only.
settings.age_group.title: Age group
settings.age_group.hint: Optional. Stored with your profile; predictions use only your own cycle history.
stats.perimenopause_hint: After 45, cycles often become less predictable. If you notice persistent differences of 7 or more days between consecutive cycles, that can be an early sign of perimenopause — consider speaking with a healthcare professional.
settings.goal.title: Usage goal
settings.goal.hint: Optional. This changes how fertile days and summaries are framed in the UI. It does not change the algorithm.
settings.interface.title: Interface
settings.interface.subtitle: App language and theme.
settings.interface.language_hint: Save to update navigation, settings, and date labels across the app.
settings.interface.preview_hint: Theme preview updates immediately and is saved in this browser when you press Save.
settings.draft.unsaved_prompt: You have unsaved settings changes. Leave without saving?
settings.interface.unsaved_prompt: You have unsaved interface changes. Leave without saving?
settings.account.title: Account
settings.account.subtitle: Profile, password and advanced security controls.
settings.profile.title: Profile
settings.profile.subtitle: Set the name shown in navigation and account header.
settings.change_password.title: Change password
settings.change_password.subtitle: Update your account password.
settings.local_password.title: Set a local password
settings.local_password.subtitle: This account currently signs in through SSO only. Set a local password if you want recovery codes and password-confirmed safety actions.
settings.security.advanced_hint: Recovery code and account protection tools.
settings.recovery_code.title: Recovery code
settings.recovery_code.subtitle: Generate a new recovery code. Your previous code will stop working.
settings.local_password.recovery_unavail: Recovery codes become available after you set a local password for this account.
settings.symptoms.title: Custom symptoms
settings.symptoms.subtitle: Create short private labels for patterns you want to log. Hidden symptoms stay in past records and exports.
settings.symptoms.name: Name
settings.symptoms.active_hint: These appear in dashboard and calendar day editing.
settings.symptoms.archived_hint: Past logs keep them. Restore one when you want it back in the picker.
settings.symptoms.empty: No custom symptoms yet. Add one above to make it available in new entries.
settings.symptoms.empty_active: No visible custom symptoms right now. Restore one below or add a new one above.
settings.symptoms.confirm_hide: Hide this custom symptom from new entries? Existing logs will keep it.
settings.export_invalid_range: End date must be on or after start date.
settings.export_data_hint: Exports manually tracked entries as CSV or JSON only. Predictions (fertile window and ovulation) are not included.
settings.data.title: Your data
settings.data.subtitle: Your records stay in the local database on this server. Export is your backup.
settings.clear_data.title: Clear all tracking data
settings.clear_data.subtitle: Delete all tracked calendar entries, reset cycle settings to defaults, and remove your custom symptoms. Built-in symptoms stay available.
settings.danger_zone.title: Danger zone
settings.danger_zone.subtitle: Delete your account permanently. This action cannot be undone.
settings.local_password.danger_hint: Set a local password first if you want password-confirmed safety actions such as clearing health data.
settings.delete_account.title: Delete account
settings.local_password.required_before_: Set a local password before deleting this account or using other password-confirmed safety actions.
settings.confirm_regenerate_recovery_cod: Regenerate your recovery code? The previous code will no longer work.
settings.confirm_clear_data: Delete all calendar records, reset your cycle, and remove custom symptoms? This cannot be undone.
settings.confirm_delete_account: Delete your account and all data permanently? This cannot be undone.
settings.symptoms.success.hidden: Custom symptom hidden from new entries.
settings.symptoms.success.restored: Custom symptom restored to the picker.
settings.error.invalid_input: Please provide current, new, and confirmation passwords.
settings.error.display_name_too_long: Profile name must be 64 characters or fewer.
settings.error.display_name_invalid_char: Use plain text only. Tags and angle brackets are not allowed.
settings.error.invalid_last_period_start: Please enter a valid last period start date that is not in the future.
settings.error.password_unchanged: New password must be different from current password.
settings.error.local_password_required: Set a local password first to use this action.
settings.symptoms.error.name_too_long: Use 40 characters or fewer. For longer details, use notes.
settings.symptoms.error.invalid_characte: Use plain text only. Tags and angle brackets are not allowed.
settings.symptoms.error.duplicate_name: That symptom name already exists in your list.
settings.symptoms.error.not_found: That symptom could not be found.
settings.symptoms.error.create_failed: Failed to add the custom symptom.
settings.symptoms.error.update_failed: Failed to update the custom symptom.
settings.symptoms.error.hide_failed: Failed to hide the custom symptom.
settings.symptoms.error.restore_failed: Failed to restore the custom symptom.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Ovumcy is built for private, self-hosted tracking.
privacy.zero_collection.title: Zero Data Collection
privacy.zero_collection.body: Ovumcy runs on your own server. It does not include analytics, ad tracking, or hidden telemetry.
privacy.your_data.title: Your Data
privacy.your_data.body: Your records stay in the SQLite or PostgreSQL database on this server. You control access, backups, export, and deletion.
privacy.your_rights.title: Your Rights
privacy.your_rights.body: You can view all your data on the dashboard, calendar, and stats pages, export a full machine-readable copy as CSV or JSON, change your password and recovery code, clear health records while keeping the account, or delete the account entirely. Under GDPR these correspond to the rights of access, rectification, portability, restriction, and erasure. The operator who runs this instance acts as the data controller and is the contact point for any request that the in-app controls cannot fulfil.
privacy.retention.title: Retention
privacy.retention.body: Ovumcy does not delete your records on a schedule. Cycle history, daily logs, and custom symptoms stay until you clear data or delete the account from settings. The operator running this instance may keep encrypted backups outside the application; ask them about backup retention.
privacy.hidden_sections.title: Hidden sections and exports
privacy.hidden_sections.body: When you hide an owner-only section in settings, Ovumcy only removes it from new dashboard and calendar entry forms. Saved values stay in your history and still appear in CSV and JSON exports until you delete them.
privacy.predictions.title: Predictions and automated decisions
privacy.predictions.body: Cycle and ovulation predictions are statistical summaries of your own logged days. They never trigger decisions with legal effects and they are not shared with anyone. Ovumcy stays conservative when data is sparse, switches to ranges in irregular-cycle mode, and suppresses predictions entirely when you enable unpredictable-cycle mode.
privacy.third_parties.title: Third Parties
privacy.third_parties.body: No third-party data sharing is built in.
privacy.open_source.title: Open Source
privacy.open_source.body: Ovumcy is released under AGPL v3 and developed in the open on GitHub.
dashboard.cycle_day_long_hint: Longer than your typical cycle (%d days).
dashboard.cycle_day_stale_hint: Cycle data may be outdated. Update your last period start date.
dashboard.phase_estimated: Phase shown as estimate due stale baseline.
dashboard.next_period_need_cycles: 3 cycles are needed for a reliable range
dashboard.next_period_prompt: Enter the start date of your last cycle
prediction.explainer.unpredictable: Predictions are off in unpredictable cycle mode. Ovumcy shows recorded facts only.
prediction.explainer.irregular_ranges: Irregular cycle mode uses ranges instead of exact prediction dates.
prediction.explainer.irregular_sparse: Irregular cycle mode needs at least 3 completed cycles before Ovumcy can show steadier ranges.
prediction.explainer.variable_ranges: Your prediction shows a range that reflects how much your cycle length varies.
prediction.explainer.factor_context: Recent tags can add context when timing feels less steady.
dashboard.ovulation_need_cycles: 3 completed cycles are needed before Ovumcy shows an ovulation range
dashboard.prediction_in_past: Date is already in the past.
usage_goal.ui_only_hint: This changes how timing is framed in the interface only. Calculations stay the same.
usage_goal.summary.avoid: Fertile indicators are framed conservatively so higher-risk days stand out first.
usage_goal.summary.trying: Fertile indicators are framed around timing opportunities while the same recorded facts stay visible.
usage_goal.summary.health: The interface stays neutral and keeps the focus on logging patterns over time.
dashboard.cycle_hero_estimated: Cycle map is approximate and based on your current baseline.
dashboard.cycle_factors_hint: Optional context tags for things that may affect cycle timing.
dashboard.cycle_start_suggestion: This may be the first day of your period. If so, mark it as a new cycle start.
dashboard.error.invalid_cycle_start_date: A new cycle start can be marked only for past days and no more than 2 days ahead.
dashboard.cycle_start_replace_message: You already marked a cycle start on %s. Replace it with %s?
dashboard.cycle_start_short_gap_message: ⚠️ Only %s days have passed since the previous cycle. This may not be a new cycle. Previous date: %s.
dashboard.error.invalid_sex_activity: Select a valid sex activity value.
dashboard.error.invalid_cervical_mucus: Select a valid cervical mucus value.
dashboard.first_dashboard_tip: You can log period days, symptoms, mood, temperature, and notes here. Quick actions at the top help you capture the most common updates faster.
dashboard.period_tip_once: Day 1 is the first day of full flow, not spotting.
dashboard.spotting_cycle_warning: Spotting may not be day 1. Check again tomorrow.
dashboard.long_period_warning: A period longer than 8 days is worth discussing with a doctor.
dashboard.implantation_warning: This may be implantation bleeding, not a new cycle. If you are trying to conceive, consider taking a test.
dashboard.intimacy_hidden_hint: This section is hidden in settings.
dashboard.sex_settings_hint: You can hide this section in settings.
dashboard.cervical_mucus_explainer: Cervical mucus means vaginal discharge. Egg-white mucus usually appears near peak fertility.
dashboard.autosave_invalid: Fix the form errors to save
dashboard.save_message_self_care: Saved. Take care of yourself today 🌸
dashboard.save_message_fertile: Saved. You are in your fertile window right now.

stats.title: Insights
stats.subtitle: See how your cycle length, phases and symptoms change over time.
stats.data_notice: Data is still limited. The picture will sharpen as you log more cycles.
stats.empty_body: Enter the start of your next period to complete your first cycle and unlock insights.
stats.empty_body_zero: Complete 2 cycles to unlock insights. Start by entering the first day of your next period.
stats.empty_body_one: You have 1 completed cycle. Complete one more cycle to unlock insights.
stats.empty_progress_hint: Predictions become clearer after at least 2 completed cycles.
stats.irregular_notice: Your cycles vary from %d to %d days. This is an irregular rhythm. Predictions are approximate.
stats.factor_context_hint: These tags can add context when timing feels less consistent, but they do not prove a medical cause.
stats.factor_pattern_longer: Factors seen more often in longer cycles
stats.factor_pattern_shorter: Factors seen more often in shorter cycles
stats.reliability.sample_recent: Based on the last %d completed cycles.
stats.reliability.hint: More completed cycles make the predicted range steadier.
stats.reliability.hint_variable: Predictions may vary more when cycle length changes from cycle to cycle.
stats.irregular_recommendation: Consider enabling irregular cycle mode in settings.
stats.facts_only_hint: This mode keeps the page focused on logged history rather than estimates.
stats.cycle_chart_summary: %d completed cycles shown. Latest cycle %d %s. Average %d %s. Range %d to %d %s.
stats.cycle_chart_summary_no_baseline: %d completed cycles shown. Latest cycle %d %s. Range %d to %d %s.
stats.last_cycle_symptoms_title: Top symptoms in your last cycle
stats.last_cycle_symptoms_subtitle: The three symptoms that appeared most often in the last completed cycle.
stats.no_cycle_symptom_data: No symptoms were logged in your last completed cycle.
stats.bbt_caption: Measure every morning at the same time, before getting out of bed.
stats.symptom_patterns_subtitle: Symptoms that tend to return around the same cycle days.
stats.symptom_pattern_day: Usually on day %d of the cycle
stats.symptom_pattern_days: Usually on days %d-%d of the cycle
stats.phase_mood_subtitle: Average mood score in each completed phase.
stats.phase_symptoms_subtitle: Top symptoms in each phase across completed cycles.
settings.tracking.title: Additional tracking
settings.tracking.subtitle: Turn on the owner-only fields you want in daily logging. These toggles only change new dashboard and calendar entry forms. Existing values stay in your private history and exports.
settings.tracking.track_bbt_hint: Adds a basal body temperature field to dashboard and calendar day editing. Saved values still appear in owner history, stats, and exports.
settings.tracking.track_bbt_state_on: Currently visible in dashboard and calendar day editor.
settings.tracking.track_bbt_state_off: Currently hidden from new dashboard and calendar entries.
settings.tracking.track_cervical_mucus_h: Adds cervical mucus choices to dashboard and calendar day editing. Saved values still appear in owner history and exports.
settings.tracking.track_cervical_mucus_s: Currently visible in dashboard and calendar day editor.
Currently hidden from new dashboard and calendar entries.
settings.tracking.hide_sex_chip_hint: Removes the intimacy section from new dashboard and calendar entries. Saved activity still appears in your private history and exports.
settings.tracking.hide_sex_chip_state_on: Currently hidden in dashboard and calendar day editor.
settings.tracking.hide_sex_chip_state_of: Currently visible in dashboard and calendar day editor.
settings.tracking.hide_cycle_factors_hin: Removes cycle factor labels from new dashboard and calendar entries. Saved labels still appear in your private history and exports.
settings.tracking.hide_cycle_factors_sta: Currently hidden in dashboard and calendar day editor.
Currently visible in dashboard and calendar day editor.
settings.tracking.hide_notes_field_hint: Removes the notes section from new dashboard and calendar entries. Saved notes still appear in your private history and exports.
settings.tracking.hide_notes_field_state: Currently hidden in dashboard and calendar day editor.
Currently visible in dashboard and calendar day editor.
settings.tracking.show_historical_phases: Show fertile windows on past cycles
Paint ovulation, fertility peak, and pre-fertile markers on past completed cycles in the calendar, derived from your logged cycle starts.
Currently shown on past months in the calendar.
Currently hidden; only the next predicted cycles show fertile windows.
settings.tracking.temperature_unit_hint: Used when the BBT field is visible. Exports stay in °C.
settings.data.storage_copy: Your records stay in the SQLite or PostgreSQL database on this server. CSV and JSON export give you a copy when you need one.
settings.local_data_hint: Hidden entry sections are a UI-only preference. Saved values stay in your history and still appear in CSV and JSON exports until you delete them.
